About.bio:
I am a Senior Full-Stack Developer with over 15 years of experience building high-performance web applications and complex e-commerce ecosystems. My core expertise lies in bridging backend complexity with modern, lightning-fast frontends—whether that means architecting decoupled setups or launching sleek storefronts using Hyvä and Magento.
Over the past few years, my commercial work has been focused on driving architectural decisions for major international brands, optimizing databases with tens of millions of records and creating new features for the B2C ecommerce store. I was also a part of a two person team that built a fully-functional ecommerce platform using Vue.js, Node.js, Elasticsearch, Magento, and Wordpress which was used by 4 stores.
When I step away from commercial PHP and Node.js code, I still love to build. My hobby projects are where software meets hardware. I design custom PCBs, program microcontrollers such as a solar-powered e-ink weather station. I also enjoy tinkering with FreeCAD and 3D printing to customize mechanical keyboards.
